temporal_description: A medium shot shows a man in a white shirt and dark tie standing with his hands on his hips, looking down with a serious expression. He has an ID badge hanging from a lanyard around his neck. In the foreground, the back of another man's head is visible. To the left, a monitor displays a blue-tinted, grainy image. The setting appears to be a modern, dimly lit office or control room with glass partitions in the background. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. A man speaks in a serious and authoritative tone, delivering information with a steady, deliberate pace. His voice is firm and clear, suggesting he is in a position of authority, possibly making a formal statement or briefing others. "这是黄警司。" The camera cuts to a close-up of two men sitting side-by-side. The man on the left, in a police uniform with epaulets, looks down with a somber expression. The man on the right, in a white shirt and tie, also looks down, his face partially obscured. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. "死的和受伤的疑凶，全都是韩琛的手下。" The camera pans slightly to the right, focusing more on the man in the police uniform as he continues to look down. The man on the right is now out of focus. The background is a blurred office environment. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The shot becomes blurry and out of focus, showing indistinct figures in a dimly lit space. The "风行网" watermark is visible in the upper left corner. The audio is clean, with no background music or sound effects, placing all the emphasis on the speaker's formal and grave delivery.
